channel.title: IQC arXiv Feed
channel.description: arXiv papers by tracked IQC authors.

item.title: Imperfect detectors for adversarial tasks with applications to quantum key distribution
item.author: Shlok Nahar, Devashish Tupkary, Norbert Lütkenhaus

item.title: A generalized K-space coherent averaging method for engineering lattices of spin-orbit beams
item.author: Pinki Chahal, Naume Shentevski, Priyanka Vadnere, David G. Cory, Owen Lailey, D. A. Pushin, Dusan Sarenac
